business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial real estate investment and management — warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio

positives: Approximately 90% of units are regularly occupied
Fire alarms are hard-wired with central station monitoring
Written contracts with indemnification are required from all contractors
No claims or cancellations reported in prior insurance history from 2022 through 2024
concerns: Building is not fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R
One listed location is not sprinklered
No written contracts with all subcontractors
Short-term rentals of less than 1 year are permitted
Commercial occupancy exists within the building
Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) are not maintained
Lockout/tagout procedures are not in place
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Prior insurance history shows 0 claims in 2022, 2023, and 2024, with no cancellations.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Industrial real estate investment and management — warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio. Years in Business: 31. Years with Current Management: 22. Number of Employees: 95 full-time and 18 part-time. Annual Revenue / Gross Receipts: 48000000. Hours of Operation: Mon-Fri 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Sat 9:00 AM - 1:00 PM.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Do you have a formal safety program? Yes. What percentage of units are regularly occupied vs. vacant? 90%. Is the building fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R? No. Are EV charging stations installed on the premises? No. Are there swimming pools, exercise rooms, or other amenities? No. Are short-term rentals (less than 1 year) permitted? Yes. Is there 24-hour doorperson or security on premises? Yes. When was the last plumbing, HVAC, and electrical system update? Plumbing 2015, HVAC 2018, Electrical 2023. Are fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring? Yes. Is there any commercial occupancy within the building? Yes. Are written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors? Yes. Are Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) maintained? No. Are lockout/tagout procedures in place? No.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: 2024 Liberty Mutual Insurance, premium 392002.31, 0 claims, no cancellations; 2023 Hartford Financial Services, premium 419914.35, 0 claims, no cancellations; 2022 Chubb Limited, premium 456514.1, 0 claims, no cancellations.
